name: california-butte
description: Butte County civic data from official county government websites

config.description: Butte County civic data from official county government websites

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract scheduled and past Butte County Board of Supervisors meetings — meeting date, time, location, agenda PDF link, and minutes link when available. Each item should yield one Meeting record with externalId (date + body slug), title, body ('Butte County Board of Supervisors'), scheduledAt (combined date + time), location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl.
hints: Butte County Board of Supervisors publishes meeting agendas at this URL
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, body, scheduledAt, location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl
Past meetings and upcoming meetings may live on the same page or on tabbed/paginated sections — capture both when present

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract Butte County Board of Supervisors members — name, district number, party affiliation if listed, photo URL, contact info (phone, email, district office address), and profile page link. Construct externalId as 'california-butte-supervisor-{district}' using the district number.
hints: externalId: construct as 'california-butte-supervisor-{district}' using the district number
The main content area is wrapped in a container with class 'pageContent cpGrid cpGrid24' which likely holds the list of representatives.
Representative details are likely contained within 'div' elements with class 'widget editor pageStyles' or similar grid columns.
The 'photoUrl' field likely corresponds to 'img' elements with class 'bannerObject' or similar image tags found within the representative cards.
The 'detailUrl' field likely corresponds to 'a' tags with 'href' attributes pointing to individual member profiles.

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract current and past ballot measures for Butte County — measure identifier (letter/number), full title, election date, sponsoring jurisdiction, measure type (bond, tax, initiative, ordinance, charter amendment, etc.), summary description, and official outcome (passed/failed) where available.
hints: Butte County Registrar of Voters publishes ballot measures at this URL

Extract current and past ballot measures — measure letter/number, title, election date, jurisdiction (county, city, district), measure type (bond, tax, initiative, etc.), short description, and outcome when available
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, electionDate, jurisdiction, measureType, description, outcome

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract campaign finance disclosure filings for Butte County — committee name, filer type (candidate/measure committee), election, total contributions received, total expenditures made, and top contributors with amounts.
hints: Butte County campaign finance disclosure portal
Extract campaign finance filings — committee name, candidate or measure supported/opposed, filing date, total contributions, total expenditures, top contributors (name, amount), and reporting period
Use these EXACT field names: committeeId, committeeName, candidateOrMeasure, filingDate, totalContributions, totalExpenditures, reportingPeriod
